name: Box Rush
description: Start your engines and hit the road in this fast-paced arcade driving challenge! Race through dynamic levels packed with collectibles, tight turns, and tricky obstacles standing in your way. Grab every item before time runs out while mastering precise steering and quick reactions to stay on track. Each level tests your control, speed, and ability to navigate flawlessly under pressure. Easy to pick up but demanding real skill to master, every second counts as you chase the perfect run. Can you collect everything and beat the clock without crashing?
instructions: Drive through the level and collect all the required items Watch the timer - finish before time runs out Avoid obstacles and stay in control of your vehicle Use smooth steering to handle tight turns and tricky paths Collect everything to complete the
